issue_title: [BUG] - scrolling not working in the filter view
issue_body_preview:
### Description

Scrolling does not work in the filter view. I can't scroll with my mouse, and scrolling with my mouse doesn't "activate" the scroll wheel to appear. The only way to get around this is to change my **System Settings** scroll behavior to **Always Show**, which I don't want to do. This
test_description_zh: 打开 Next Admin 的列表页面，点击筛选/过滤按钮展开过滤视图，在过滤条件较多（超出可视区域）的情况下，使用鼠标滚轮尝试在过滤视图内上下滚动，观察滚动条是否出现以及内容是否能正常滚动。
expected_result_zh: 过滤视图内容超出可视区域时，使用鼠标滚轮应能正常滚动内容，滚动条应正确显示并可交互，无需修改系统设置即可正常使用滚动功能。
